#1 Software solution for
Real Estate Agencies

Manage your real estate agency, from creating detailed property listings to booking visits, handling customer relationships, and closing the sale.

Start now
Meet an advisor
  • Micro Business (1-5 employees)
  • Small Business (6-50 employees)
  • Midsized company (51-250 employees)
  • Micro entreprise (1-5 employés) - Français
  • Petite entreprise (6-50 employés) - Français
  • Empresas Pequeñas (<50 empleados) - Español
  • Large company (250+ employees)

Odoo had helped us kick-start our digital transformation process. It provided us with an integrated system of different applications needed for our business to race ahead into digital.

Red J. Rosales
President, and COO of Bria Homes

Showcase your properties

Create property listings. List houses and apartments, along with detailed information about their layout, surface, number of rooms, energy rating, and more.

Custom searches let users filter by specific requirements, and be notified when a property that matches their criteria becomes available.

Build your website with Odoo's AI-based website builder!

Nourish relationships

Centralize leads. Odoo's CRM allows you to capture and nurture every lead, whether it comes from your website, email, WhatsApp, or else.

Schedule appointments. Clients can book directly from the website, and your calendar is synchronized so you never double book.

Keep track of activities such as uploading and signing documents, meetings, and calls.

Manage documents, collect signatures

Odoo's document workspace supports various file formats and allows you to organize all the necessary files for closing a sale, including property plans, contracts, and legal documents.

Collect signatures in seconds. Your clients can access and review documents on any device and sign them electronically with just a few clicks.

Integrated finance management

Enjoy the flexible invoicing: Invoice clients in one click, using their preferred method. Choose from email, snail mail, e-invoicing, or a QR code.

Set up a commission plan to reward salespersons and property sellers. Odoo calculates the commission automatically as soon as the deal is closed!

But wait! There's more!

All the features
done right.

Website builder

Create a stunning website in a flash using Odoo's AI-based builder, page templates, and property listing module.

Property matchmaking

Use dedicated forms to collect information about the client's preferences and keep them updated whenever a suitable property becomes available.

CRM pipeline

Keep an eye on all your leads and ensure you never miss a follow-up.

Custom quotations

Build stunning quotations with pictures, building plans, energy ratings, and more. Once you're happy with a quote, save it as a template for future use!

Valid electronic signatures

Odoo complies with eIDAS for all European countries, the US ESIGN Act, the ITA and ICA in India, and most countries worldwide.

Easy invoicing

Create customized invoices and enable a range of payment methods.

One need, one app.

Expand as you grow.

Odoo is a suite of open source business apps that cover all your company needs: CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory, point of sale, project management, etc.

Odoo's unique value proposition is to be at the same time very easy to use and fully integrated.
